evals.prompt: Поставь мне sub2api в Docker/WSL, чтобы Claude Code ходил через мою Codex подписку, модель gpt-5.6 full power, и проверь /context.
evals.expected_output: Provides Docker/WSL install steps for the Headroom-first compose chain, builds/uses headroom-sub2api:0.31.0 with headroom-ai[proxy,code,relevance,html,spreadsheet,otel,reports,mcp] plus RTK, lean-ctx, TokenSave, ast-grep, difft, scc, and the downstream embedding-server patch in front of sub2api, configures Claude Code ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL to http://127.0.0.1:8787 while keeping sub2api :18081 for admin/diagnostics only, registers the headroom MCP through Docker and removes stale missing host headroom/tokensave MCP entries, persists all service state on host bind mounts under SUB2API_STATE_ROOT rather than Docker named volumes, persists Headroom memory/embeddings via /root/.headroom and warmed model caches via /root/.cache/headroom plus /root/.cache/huggingface, keeps the start-headroom-proxy bootstrap so fresh host state dirs are seeded from /opt/headroom-seed without hiding bundled tools, uses gpt-5.6-sol for main work, gpt-5.3-codex-spark for small-fast/compact first hop, and gpt-5.6-terra-medium with effort medium for default-Haiku/general-purpose/Explore/workflow paths while Spark is quota-limited, adds gpt-5.6-terra-medium -> gpt-5.6-sol-medium model_fallbacks for empty Terra tool turns, keeps gpt-5.3-codex-spark as the server-side compact_model_mapping target with gpt-5.6-luna as the only compact fallback, sets only a soft startup effortLevel=xhigh, clears persistent CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL so /effort remains usable, verifies GPT-5.6 explicit --effort max requests reach usage_logs.reasoning_effort=max, sets CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONTEXT_TOKENS=370000 and CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW=340000 for the Claude Code safe compact profile, and verifies Headroom health/upstream, image bootstrap, Docker inspect Type=bind state mounts, ccr_store.db, embedding-server logs/socket/SocketEmbedderClient, headroom tools doctor/savings/perf, sub2api health, /context, and usage logs.

evals.prompt: Claude Code показывает gpt-5.6-sol, но /context все равно 17k/200k. Почини и не путай client target с model window.
evals.expected_output: Explains that Claude Code's displayed denominator is controlled by CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONTEXT_TOKENS and CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW, while GPT-5.6's configured model window is 1.05M. Sets CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONTEXT_TOKENS=370000 and CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW=340000 for the current safe compact profile, restarts Claude Code, verifies /context matches the configured client target instead of /200k, and checks logs for real context_length_exceeded before claiming an upstream ceiling.

evals.prompt: sub2api отвечает Unknown model claude-opus-4-8. Настрой mapping на GPT-5.6 для Claude Code.
evals.expected_output: Adds exact mappings for claude-opus-4-8 and family aliases to gpt-5.6-sol, maps sonnet aliases to gpt-5.6-terra, maps haiku aliases to gpt-5.3-codex-spark with model_fallbacks to gpt-5.6-luna, confirms allow_messages_dispatch and require_oauth_only, then verifies route evidence in usage_logs or response model.

evals.prompt: Claude Code через sub2api иногда дает пустые ответы и в usage_logs вижу 0/0 tokens. Разбери и почини full power профиль.
evals.expected_output: Checks Claude JSONL plus sub2api usage_logs for stream=true 0/0 ghost streams, keeps MAX_THINKING_TOKENS=8000 as a Claude Code compatibility guard, explains that Codex reasoning is requested by effort=max and GPT-5.6 should reach upstream reasoning.effort=max while legacy models may downgrade to xhigh, and tells the user to restart/fork old Claude sessions.

evals.prompt: Claude Code пишет API Error: 503 Service temporarily unavailable, но sub2api /health живой. Отследи ошибку на прокси.
evals.expected_output: Checks Headroom health/upstream first, then sub2api logs for openai_messages.account_select_failed/no available accounts before status_code=503 or 429, queries ops_error_logs and accounts for upstream usage limit plus rate_limited_at/rate_limit_reset_at, distinguishes this from context-window, ghost-stream, and Headroom routing failures, and recommends waiting for reset, reducing fan-out, or adding another valid OpenAI/Codex account instead of only raising concurrency.

evals.prompt: Сделай быструю компактизацию Claude Code через sub2api: основная модель gpt-5.6-sol, small-fast gpt-5.3-codex-spark, fallback gpt-5.6-luna, и проверь.
evals.expected_output: Keeps ANTHROPIC_MODEL on gpt-5.6-sol and ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL on gpt-5.3-codex-spark with normal model_fallbacks to gpt-5.6-luna; while Spark is quota-limited, keeps ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL, CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL, and frequent delegated agents on gpt-5.6-terra-medium with effort medium plus gpt-5.6-sol-medium fallback. Direct gpt-5.6-luna falls back to gpt-5.3-codex-spark unless usage_logs proves native Luna. Configures or verifies sub2api account compact_model_mapping from gpt-5.6-sol/gpt-5.6-terra/gpt-5.6-luna to gpt-5.3-codex-spark plus compact_model_fallbacks from Spark to gpt-5.6-luna, restarts the sub2api container only if needed, and confirms compact routing from usage_logs.requested_model/upstream_model.

evals.prompt: Почини Headroom/sub2api persistence так, чтобы я больше не пинал за Docker volumes и чтобы эмбеддинги не терялись.
evals.expected_output: Proactively audits Docker inspect mounts before claiming done, refuses Docker named volumes for state, configures SUB2API_STATE_ROOT host bind mounts for Headroom /root/.headroom, /root/.cache/headroom, /root/.cache/huggingface, sub2api /app/data, Postgres data, and Redis /data, keeps the start-headroom-proxy bootstrap seed path, recreates only affected services, verifies Type=bind for every stateful container, verifies CCR_STORE True with nonzero size after memory traffic, verifies embedding-server SocketEmbedderClient and EMBED_OK, syncs the installed local skill, and commits/pushes repo skill/docs/script changes.

evals.prompt: Мне нужен GPU для Headroom в Docker/WSL. Настрой, сравни с CPU и докажи, что Kompress реально работает на видеокарте.
evals.expected_output: Keeps CPU as the portable default, selects the opt-in gpu image stage and docker-compose.gpu.yml on NVIDIA hosts, installs the pinned official CUDA PyTorch wheel, persists HEADROOM_ACCELERATOR=cuda plus HEADROOM_DOCKER_TARGET=gpu and HEADROOM_KOMPRESS_BACKEND=pytorch, proves non-empty Docker DeviceRequests, torch.cuda.is_available(), the expected device name, and Kompress preload backend pytorch, runs benchmark-headroom-kompress on identical CPU/GPU payloads, compares latency, throughput, compression ratio, and sentinel retention, verifies a real Headroom request and executor health, syncs repo/local skills, and does not claim that GPU alone solves partial-result compression, per-session singleflight, or unsafe oversized fail-open.

evals.prompt: После перезагрузки Sub2API Codex Proxy Stack Autostart падает с Wsl/Service/0x8007274c, хотя контейнеры потом живые. Почини без второго автозапуска.
evals.expected_output: Finds the exact scheduled-task log, normalizes UTF-16/NUL WSL output before classifying it, retries transient Wsl/Service/0x8007274c connection failures on every WSL command within a bounded deadline, preserves the single scheduled-task owner and GPU compose overlay, runs the real Scheduled Task, requires LastTaskResult=0, and rechecks Headroom health, Docker DeviceRequests, and CUDA after the task path.

evals.prompt: RTK способен сильно резать вывод, но Headroom показывает RTK 0 commands / 0 tokens saved. Настрой автоматическое участие в Claude Code и закрепи в skill.
evals.expected_output: Explains that container-only RTK cannot rewrite Claude Code Bash commands executed on Windows, installs pinned RTK on Windows plus WSL, keeps exactly one global PreToolUse(Bash) bridge with MSYS2_ARG_CONV_EXCL so Git Bash cannot corrupt Linux paths, preserves cat/git diff/git show/curl accuracy exclusions and RTK_DISABLED bypass, mounts the host RTK history into Headroom /root/.local/share/rtk, verifies the bridge through Git Bash rather than direct PowerShell-to-WSL, proves a real fresh Claude Code Bash tool call creates a new history.db row and matching host/container gain totals, verifies headroom perf cli_filtering is nonzero, and does not present a manual container benchmark as automatic live savings.
